_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: NCI-H266 was completely eliminated at an E:T of 0.2:1, with the lysis decreasing as the E:T ratio was reduced.
details: Completely eliminated by 806 CAR-T cells at E:T ratio of 0.2:1
